# source: https://github.com/dbt-labs/dbt-core/issues/10135
# repo: dbt-labs/dbt-core
# title: [Bug] dbtCore - after upgrading, can't run DBT
# 
# ### Is this a new bug in dbt-core?
# - [X] I believe this is a new bug in dbt-core
# - [X] I have searched the existing issues, and I could not find an existing issue for this bug
# ### Current Behavior
# I installed dbt-core, bigquery, and postgres, and then when typing `dbt --version` I get this error:
# This is after installing bigquery, postgres, 
# ### Expected Behavior
# Should show the version of dbt packages
# ### Steps To Reproduce
# 1. Install dbt-core
# 2. Run `dbt --version`
# ### Relevant log output
# _No response_
# ### Environment
# ### Which database adapter are you using with dbt?
# _No response_
# ### Additional Context
# _No response_
